title: Cobbletutor
description: Adds configurable move tutor that can be set to any mob and teach any pokemon a move from their egg moves, tutor moves or tm moves list(each togglable)
body:
CobbleTutor is a server-side move tutor and utility NPC mod for Cobblemon 1.7.1 (MC 1.21.1).

It lets you tag vanilla entities as tutors, inspectors, or rules NPCs. Tutors open Cobblemon’s native party, move, and slot pickers to teach legal non–level-up moves with full config control, including filters, restrictions, cooldowns, and PvP legality. Replaced moves are safely stored and can be relearned.

Tutoring is paid using a configurable token item with strict validation and optional admin bypass. Species presets can replace entire movesets, and moves can be exported to chat. Inspector NPCs display detailed Pokémon stats, while Rules NPCs show configurable server rules text.

Everything is controlled via config/cobbletutor.json, with optional logging and feature toggles.
